glossary.tempo: How much control you have over the next few turns.
glossary.win condition: The plan that most reliably closes the game from your current position.
glossary.pivot: A safe switch or move used to improve board position.

weaknesses: can lose tempo if forced to recover

beginner_tips: Do not tunnel on immediate damage if a safer pivot preserves your strongest endgame piece.
Track which opposing threat actually wins the game if left unchecked.
Chip damage matters because it turns later knockouts into clean decisions.
If information is missing, prefer lower-risk lines over flashy reads.
When behind, stabilize first and only then look for a comeback sequence.
